transcript_preview: Pieci desmit. Noklausies telefonas sarunu. Ieraksti atbilstošo vārdu. Sveiks! Sveiks! Vai Reinis? Jā. Vai tu jau guli? Nē, vēl ir agars. Pulkstenis ir tikai deviņi. Ko tu gribēji? Es ar draugiem gribu atnākt ciemos. Nezinu. Ir vēls. Bet tu
translation_preview: Five-ten. Listen to the phone call. Enter the appropriate name. Hey! Hey! Or Reinis? Yeah. Are you sleeping? No, there's still agar. The clock is only nine. What did you want? I and my friends want to come and visit. I don't know. It's late
